hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md|*.markdown) if [ -x "$HOME/.local/share/nvim/mason/bin/markdownlint-cli2" ]; then "$HOME/.local/share/nvim/mason/bin/markdownlint-cli2" --fix "$f"; elif command -v markdownlint-cli2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$f"; fi ;; esac } 2>/dev/null || true
